transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-01]
[00:00] You: Thanks for joining the API design review. Today we're finalizing the contract for the notifications service.
[00:40] Speaker 1: I've reviewed the draft spec. The pagination approach looks good but I want to flag the rate limiting headers — we should follow RFC 7231 for consistency.
[01:20] Speaker 2: Agreed. And we need to decide on the webhook retry policy. I'd suggest exponential backoff with a cap at 1 hour.
[02:00] Speaker 3: That makes sense. What about authentication for webhook endpoints? Do we require HMAC signatures?
[02:30] Speaker 4: Yes, HMAC-SHA256 signature verification should be mandatory. I can add that to the spec.
[03:00] You: Good. Let's also agree on error response formats. Speaker 2, can you write up the error schema?
[03:20] Speaker 2: I'll draft the error response schema and share it in the design doc by July 3rd.
[03:50] Speaker 1: I'll update the pagination spec to reference RFC 7231 rate limiting headers. I'll have that done by end of week, July 4th.
[04:20] Speaker 4: I'll add the HMAC signature verification requirements to the spec today.
[04:45] You: Great. We also need a review of the spec from the mobile team. Speaker 3, can you set up a call with them?
[05:00] Speaker 3: I'll schedule a spec review call with the mobile team for July 7th or 8th. I'll send the invite today.
[05:30] You: Perfect. Final spec freeze is July 10th. No changes after that.

action_items.description: Draft error response schema and share in design doc
action_items.source_quote: I'll draft the error response schema and share it in the design doc by July 3rd.

action_items.description: Update pagination spec to reference RFC 7231 rate limiting headers
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the pagination spec to reference RFC 7231 rate limiting headers. I'll have that done by end of week, July 4th.

action_items.description: Add HMAC signature verification requirements to the notifications spec
action_items.source_quote: I'll add the HMAC signature verification requirements to the spec today.

action_items.description: Schedule spec review call with mobile team for July 7th or 8th
action_items.source_quote: I'll schedule a spec review call with the mobile team for July 7th or 8th. I'll send the invite today.

decisions: Webhook retry policy: exponential backoff with cap at 1 hour
HMAC-SHA256 signature verification is mandatory for webhook endpoints
API spec freeze deadline is July 10th — no changes after that
